name: spoilt
description: Chrome extension that blacks out user-configured spoilers and unwanted content using Chrome local inference APIs when available.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:adversarial
scripts.test:unit: node tests/shared.test.cjs && node tests/memory.test.cjs && node tests/manifest.test.cjs
scripts.package: zip -r spoilt-extension.zip manifest.json src icons README.md LICENSE docs -x "*.DS_Store"
